subject: test: cover useDialogA11y stack + transactionDirty helper
body:
Adds the two test items queued in docs/TODO.md after the a11y and
forms passes introduced non-trivial behaviour worth pinning.

Setup
- happy-dom added as devDep so composable tests can touch document
  and addEventListener. ~100 KB addition; existing engine tests
  already ran under node env and are env-agnostic so they pass
  unchanged under happy-dom.
- vitest config gains `environment: 'happy-dom'`.

useDialogA11y.test.ts — 7 tests covering the stack refactor from
the a11y pass:
- isDialogOpen() initial state
- push on mount / pop on unmount
- LIFO nesting
- Escape routes only to the topmost entry (the regression the stack
  was introduced to fix)
- non-Escape keys don't trigger close
- body-scroll lock applies on first push, stays locked through
  nested mounts, releases on the last pop
- lock-release restores pre-existing inline styles instead of
  hard-resetting (important — other code may have set overflow
  before the dialog opened)

Tests mount minimal components via createApp/h directly — no
@vue/test-utils dependency added.

transactionDirty.test.ts — 12 tests. Required a small refactor:
the isDirty computation that was inline in TransactionEditModal.vue
moved to a pure helper `src/components/transactionDirty.ts`
(`isTransactionDirty(original, local) → boolean`). Component now
calls the helper via the existing computed. No behaviour change.

Coverage:
- Baseline: local mirrors original → not dirty
- Each field in isolation: description, date, amount, classification
- Direction flip (isIncome toggle) with same magnitude → dirty
- Zero-amount ambiguity → NOT dirty (signed 0 == unsigned 0)
- Tag add, remove, reorder → each dirty
- Fresh-copy tags with same contents → not dirty
- Positive-amount income also covered

Total test count: 116 → 135 (+19).

Type-check clean. All green.

Tags: tests, dialog, dirty-state, refactor
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
